title: Department Manager Vacancy at Tanishq - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Tanishq - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Tanishq in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tanishq:
Tanishq is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
